---
title: "Violin_Plots"
output: html_document
---

# Libraries

```{r}

library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

```

# Select Country, Year, and Month

```{r}

target_region <- "Chad"
target_year <- "2024"
target_month <- "08"
tile <- ifelse(target_region == "Senegal", "h16", "h19")

```

# Define Path
```{r}

day_file  <- file.path("Data", target_region, "Temperature", "Day", paste0("Day.", tile, ".", target_year, ".", target_month, ".tif"))
ndvi_file <- file.path("Data", target_region, "Vegetation", "NDVI", paste0("NDVI.", tile, ".", target_year, ".", target_month, ".tif"))
lc_file   <- file.path("Data", target_region, "LandCover", paste0("LC.", tile, ".", target_year, ".tif"))

```

# Create Rasters and Stack
```{r}

r_day  <- rast(day_file) - 273.15   
r_ndvi <- rast(ndvi_file)
r_lc   <- rast(lc_file)

# Resample continuous variables using bilinear interpolation
r_day_aligned  <- resample(r_day, r_lc, method = "bilinear")
r_ndvi_aligned <- resample(r_ndvi, r_lc, method = "bilinear")

# Stack them together (r_lc is the anchor, remains unchanged)
stack_all <- c(r_day_aligned, r_ndvi_aligned, r_lc)
names(stack_all) <- c("Day_Temp", "NDVI", "LandCover")

```

# Extract Grassland and Barren Tiles
```{r}

full_pixel_df <- as.data.frame(stack_all, na.rm = TRUE)

grass_barren <- c(
  "10" = "Grasslands", "16" = "Desert (Barren)"
)

plot_df <- full_pixel_df %>%
  # Map the numeric LandCover IDs to our text labels
  mutate(LC_Label = grass_barren[as.character(LandCover)]) %>%
  # Keep ONLY rows that successfully matched 'Grasslands' or 'Desert (Barren)'
  filter(LC_Label %in% c("Grasslands", "Desert (Barren)")) %>%
  # Drop NAs 
  drop_na() %>%
  # Reorder the factor
  mutate(LC_Label = fct_reorder(LC_Label, NDVI, .desc = TRUE))

```

# Generate Plots
```{r}

# Color palette
lc_colors <- c(
  "Grasslands" = "#1a9850", # Healthy Green
  "Desert (Barren)" = "#d73027" # Arid Red
)

# NDVI Distribution
p_ndvi <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = LC_Label, y = NDVI, fill = LC_Label)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.8, color = "black", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, fill = "white", color = "black", outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = lc_colors) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Vegetation Health (NDVI)", y = "NDVI Score") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")

# Temperature Distribution
p_temp <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = LC_Label, y = Day_Temp, fill = LC_Label)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.8, color = "black", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, fill = "white", color = "black", outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = lc_colors) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Daytime Surface Temperature", y = "Temp (°C)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")

# Combine plots using patchwork
final_plot <- p_ndvi + p_temp + 
  plot_annotation(
    title = paste(target_region, "Grasslands vs. Desert (Barren) in", target_year),
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))
  )

print(final_plot)

output_filename <- file.path("Images/Diagrams", paste0(target_region, "_", "Violin", "_", target_year, target_month, ".png"))
ggsave(output_filename, plot = final_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```
